---
title: "TRUEFAM Welfare — Executive Dashboard"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: rows
    theme: flatly
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/truefam
    embed-resources: true
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import sys, os
from pathlib import Path

# Ensure the reports directory is importable
sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(os.path.abspath("")).resolve()))
sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(os.path.abspath("")).resolve().parent / "reports"))

from db_connection import query
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go
from datetime import date

# ── Colour palette ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
COLORS = ["#2563eb", "#10b981", "#f59e0b", "#ef4444", "#8b5cf6", "#ec4899", "#06b6d4", "#84cc16"]
BG = "rgba(0,0,0,0)"

# ── Data queries ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# 1 — Headline KPIs
df_active = query("""
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM enrollment_enrollmentapplication
    WHERE status = 'approved'
""")
total_active_members = int(df_active["n"].iloc[0])

df_revenue = query("""
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_usd), 0) AS total
    FROM payments_payment
    WHERE status = 'paid'
""")
total_revenue = float(df_revenue["total"].iloc[0])

df_open_claims = query("""
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM claims_claim WHERE status = 'pending'
""")
open_claims = int(df_open_claims["n"].iloc[0])

df_collection = query("""
    SELECT
        COALESCE(SUM(total_collected_cents), 0) AS collected,
        COALESCE(SUM(total_expected_cents), 0) AS expected
    FROM claims_contributioncampaign
    WHERE status IN ('open', 'closed')
""")
collected = int(df_collection["collected"].iloc[0])
expected = int(df_collection["expected"].iloc[0])
collection_rate = round(collected / expected * 100, 1) if expected > 0 else 0.0

df_pending_apps = query("""
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM enrollment_enrollmentapplication
    WHERE status IN ('pending', 'under_review')
""")
pending_apps = int(df_pending_apps["n"].iloc[0])

df_groups = query("""
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM members_membergroup WHERE is_active = true
""")
active_groups = int(df_groups["n"].iloc[0])

# 2 — Membership growth (monthly cumulative)
df_growth = query("""
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', m.membership_start_date) AS month,
        COUNT(*) AS new_members
    FROM members_member m
    INNER JOIN enrollment_enrollmentapplication e ON e.member_id = m.id
    WHERE e.status = 'approved' AND m.membership_start_date IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
""")
if not df_growth.empty:
    df_growth["month"] = pd.to_datetime(df_growth["month"])
    df_growth["cumulative"] = df_growth["new_members"].cumsum()

# 3 — Registrations per month
df_registrations = query("""
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', date_joined) AS month, COUNT(*) AS registrations
    FROM accounts_user
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
""")
if not df_registrations.empty:
    df_registrations["month"] = pd.to_datetime(df_registrations["month"])

# 4 — Enrollment funnel
df_funnel = query("""
    SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM enrollment_enrollmentapplication
    GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
""")

# 5 — Avg processing time (approved applications)
df_proc = query("""
    SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (processed_at - submitted_at)) / 86400)::numeric, 1) AS avg_days
    FROM enrollment_enrollmentapplication
    WHERE status = 'approved' AND processed_at IS NOT NULL
""")
avg_processing_days = float(df_proc["avg_days"].iloc[0]) if not df_proc.empty and df_proc["avg_days"].iloc[0] is not None else 0

# 6 — Geographic distribution
df_geo = query("""
    SELECT m.country_of_residence AS country, COUNT(*) AS members
    FROM members_member m
    INNER JOIN enrollment_enrollmentapplication e ON e.member_id = m.id
    WHERE e.status = 'approved'
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
""")

# 7 — Gender distribution
df_gender = query("""
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.gender = '' OR m.gender IS NULL THEN 'Not specified' ELSE INITCAP(m.gender) END AS gender,
        COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM members_member m
    INNER JOIN enrollment_enrollmentapplication e ON e.member_id = m.id
    WHERE e.status = 'approved'
    GROUP BY 1
""")

# 8 — Age distribution
df_age = query(f"""
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(CURRENT_DATE, m.date_of_birth))::int AS age
    FROM members_member m
    INNER JOIN enrollment_enrollmentapplication e ON e.member_id = m.id
    WHERE e.status = 'approved' AND m.date_of_birth IS NOT NULL
""")

# 9 — Marital status
df_marital = query("""
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN m.marital_status = '' OR m.marital_status IS NULL THEN 'Not specified' ELSE INITCAP(m.marital_status) END AS status,
        COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM members_member m
    INNER JOIN enrollment_enrollmentapplication e ON e.member_id = m.id
    WHERE e.status = 'approved'
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
""")

# 10 — Revenue by month
df_rev_month = query("""
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', date) AS month, SUM(amount_usd) AS revenue
    FROM payments_payment
    WHERE status = 'paid'
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
""")
if not df_rev_month.empty:
    df_rev_month["month"] = pd.to_datetime(df_rev_month["month"])

# 11 — Plan distribution (name lives on parent table payments_stripeproduct)
df_plans = query("""
    SELECT sp.name AS plan, COUNT(*) AS subscribers
    FROM payments_membersubscription ms
    INNER JOIN payments_annualsubscriptionplan p ON p.stripeproduct_ptr_id = ms.plan_id
    INNER JOIN payments_stripeproduct sp ON sp.id = p.stripeproduct_ptr_id
    WHERE ms.status IN ('active', 'paid')
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC
""")

# 12 — Claims by status
df_claims_status = query("""
    SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count
    FROM claims_claim
    GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
""")

# 13 — Claims over time
df_claims_time = query("""
    SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', submitted_at) AS month, COUNT(*) AS claims
    FROM claims_claim
    GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
""")
if not df_claims_time.empty:
    df_claims_time["month"] = pd.to_datetime(df_claims_time["month"])

# 14 — Referrals (table may not exist in production yet)
try:
    df_referrals = query("""
        SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count
        FROM referrals_referral
        GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC
    """)
except Exception:
    df_referrals = pd.DataFrame(columns=["status", "count"])

# 15 — Campaign collection details
df_campaigns = query("""
    SELECT
        cc.id,
        cc.title,
        cc.status,
        cc.obligations_count,
        cc.paid_count,
        cc.total_expected_cents,
        cc.total_collected_cents,
        CASE WHEN cc.total_expected_cents > 0
             THEN ROUND(cc.total_collected_cents::numeric / cc.total_expected_cents * 100, 1)
             ELSE 0 END AS pct_collected
    FROM claims_contributioncampaign cc
    ORDER BY cc.started_at DESC
    LIMIT 20
""")
```

## Row {height=20%}

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Active Members"
dict(
    icon="people-fill",
    color="primary",
    value=f"{total_active_members:,}"
)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Revenue"
dict(
    icon="currency-dollar",
    color="success",
    value=f"${total_revenue:,.2f}"
)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Open Claims"
dict(
    icon="exclamation-triangle-fill",
    color="warning",
    value=f"{open_claims:,}"
)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Campaign Collection Rate"
dict(
    icon="graph-up-arrow",
    color="info",
    value=f"{collection_rate}%"
)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Pending Applications"
dict(
    icon="hourglass-split",
    color="light",
    value=f"{pending_apps:,}"
)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Active Groups"
dict(
    icon="diagram-3-fill",
    color="dark",
    value=f"{active_groups:,}"
)
```

## Row {height=40%}

### Column {width=60%}

```{python}
#| title: "Membership Growth (Cumulative)"
if not df_growth.empty:
    fig = px.area(
        df_growth, x="month", y="cumulative",
        labels={"month": "", "cumulative": "Total Members"},
        color_discrete_sequence=[COLORS[0]],
    )
    fig.update_layout(plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor=BG, margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=10, b=20))
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No membership data available.")
```

### Column {width=40%}

```{python}
#| title: "New Registrations per Month"
if not df_registrations.empty:
    fig = px.bar(
        df_registrations, x="month", y="registrations",
        labels={"month": "", "registrations": "Registrations"},
        color_discrete_sequence=[COLORS[1]],
    )
    fig.update_layout(plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor=BG, margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=10, b=20))
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No registration data available.")
```

## Row {height=40%}

### Column {width=50%}

```{python}
#| title: "Enrollment Pipeline"
if not df_funnel.empty:
    status_order = ["approved", "payment_pending", "under_review", "pending",
                    "information_needed", "resubmission_pending", "rejected", "suspended", "resigned"]
    df_funnel["status"] = pd.Categorical(df_funnel["status"], categories=status_order, ordered=True)
    df_funnel = df_funnel.sort_values("status")
    color_map = {
        "approved": "#10b981", "payment_pending": "#f59e0b", "under_review": "#3b82f6",
        "pending": "#6b7280", "information_needed": "#f97316", "resubmission_pending": "#8b5cf6",
        "rejected": "#ef4444", "suspended": "#dc2626", "resigned": "#991b1b"
    }
    fig = px.bar(
        df_funnel, y="status", x="count", orientation="h",
        labels={"status": "", "count": "Applications"},
        color="status", color_discrete_map=color_map,
    )
    fig.update_layout(
        showlegend=False, plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor=BG,
        margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=10, b=20)
    )
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No enrollment data available.")
```

### Column {width=50%}

```{python}
#| title: "Members by Country"
if not df_geo.empty:
    fig = px.bar(
        df_geo.head(10), x="members", y="country", orientation="h",
        labels={"country": "", "members": "Members"},
        color_discrete_sequence=[COLORS[4]],
    )
    fig.update_layout(
        yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"),
        plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor=BG,
        margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=10, b=20)
    )
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No geographic data available.")
```

## Row {height=40%}

### Column {width=33%}

```{python}
#| title: "Gender Distribution"
if not df_gender.empty:
    fig = px.pie(
        df_gender, names="gender", values="count",
        color_discrete_sequence=COLORS,
        hole=0.4,
    )
    fig.update_layout(margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=10, b=20))
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No gender data available.")
```

### Column {width=34%}

```{python}
#| title: "Age Distribution"
if not df_age.empty:
    fig = px.histogram(
        df_age, x="age", nbins=15,
        labels={"age": "Age", "count": "Members"},
        color_discrete_sequence=[COLORS[2]],
    )
    fig.update_layout(
        yaxis_title="Members",
        plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor=BG,
        margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=10, b=20)
    )
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No age data available.")
```

### Column {width=33%}

```{python}
#| title: "Marital Status"
if not df_marital.empty:
    fig = px.pie(
        df_marital, names="status", values="count",
        color_discrete_sequence=COLORS,
        hole=0.4,
    )
    fig.update_layout(margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=10, b=20))
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No marital status data available.")
```

## Row {height=40%}

### Column {width=50%}

```{python}
#| title: "Monthly Revenue"
if not df_rev_month.empty:
    fig = px.bar(
        df_rev_month, x="month", y="revenue",
        labels={"month": "", "revenue": "Revenue (USD)"},
        color_discrete_sequence=[COLORS[1]],
    )
    fig.update_layout(plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor=BG, margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=10, b=20))
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No revenue data available.")
```

### Column {width=50%}

```{python}
#| title: "Subscription Plan Distribution"
if not df_plans.empty:
    fig = px.pie(
        df_plans, names="plan", values="subscribers",
        color_discrete_sequence=COLORS,
        hole=0.4,
    )
    fig.update_layout(margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=10, b=20))
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No subscription data available.")
```

## Row {height=40%}

### Column {width=33%}

```{python}
#| title: "Claims by Status"
if not df_claims_status.empty:
    color_map = {"pending": "#f59e0b", "approved": "#10b981", "declined": "#ef4444", "reviewed": "#3b82f6"}
    fig = px.bar(
        df_claims_status, x="status", y="count",
        labels={"status": "", "count": "Claims"},
        color="status", color_discrete_map=color_map,
    )
    fig.update_layout(
        showlegend=False,
        plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor=BG,
        margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=10, b=20)
    )
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No claims data available.")
```

### Column {width=34%}

```{python}
#| title: "Claims Over Time"
if not df_claims_time.empty:
    fig = px.line(
        df_claims_time, x="month", y="claims",
        labels={"month": "", "claims": "Claims"},
        color_discrete_sequence=[COLORS[3]],
        markers=True,
    )
    fig.update_layout(plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor=BG, margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=10, b=20))
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No claims timeline data available.")
```

### Column {width=33%}

```{python}
#| title: "Referral Programme"
if not df_referrals.empty:
    fig = px.bar(
        df_referrals, x="status", y="count",
        labels={"status": "", "count": "Referrals"},
        color_discrete_sequence=[COLORS[6]],
    )
    fig.update_layout(plot_bgcolor=BG, paper_bgcolor=BG, margin=dict(l=20, r=20, t=10, b=20))
    fig.show()
else:
    print("No referral data available.")
```

## Row {height=35%}

```{python}
#| title: "Campaign Collection Details (Last 20)"
if not df_campaigns.empty:
    display_df = df_campaigns.copy()
    display_df["total_expected"] = (display_df["total_expected_cents"] / 100).map("${:,.2f}".format)
    display_df["total_collected"] = (display_df["total_collected_cents"] / 100).map("${:,.2f}".format)
    display_df["collection_rate"] = display_df["pct_collected"].map("{}%".format)
    display_df = display_df[["title", "status", "obligations_count", "paid_count", "total_expected", "total_collected", "collection_rate"]]
    display_df.columns = ["Campaign", "Status", "Obligations", "Paid", "Expected", "Collected", "Rate"]
    display_df
else:
    print("No campaign data available.")
```

```{python}
#| title: "Key Metrics Summary"
summary = {
    "Metric": [
        "Total Active Members",
        "Total Revenue Collected",
        "Open Claims",
        "Campaign Collection Rate",
        "Pending Applications",
        "Active Groups",
        "Avg. Application Processing (days)",
    ],
    "Value": [
        f"{total_active_members:,}",
        f"${total_revenue:,.2f}",
        f"{open_claims:,}",
        f"{collection_rate}%",
        f"{pending_apps:,}",
        f"{active_groups:,}",
        f"{avg_processing_days}",
    ],
}
pd.DataFrame(summary)
```
